subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Thy letter was received, and from its words and principles the sweetness of its meanings became manifest. Glory be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار روحانی نامه شما رسید و از الفاظ و مبادی حلاوت معانی مشهود گردید سبحان
subcodes.subjects: @language and the structure of reality, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @business; financial; property matters, @wisdom [hikmat], @charitable associations; humanitarian activities
